title: draba gilliesii
intro: Draba gilliesii, also known as Gillies' whitlow-grass, is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Draba gilliesii include its ability to treat wounds, reduce inflammation, and combat bacterial infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, salves, and tinctures, which can be applied topically or ingested to reap its medicinal benefits.
